description: You can use the element in the global variable folder to get the variable that is defined as a global variable in Integration Server Administrator.

services.name: pub.globalVariable:getGlobalVariable
description: WmPublic. Returns a global variable value.

input_parameters.name: key
description: Name of a global variable. For more information about global variables, see IBM webMethods Integration Server Administrator’s Guide .

input_parameters.name: defaultValue
description: Optional. The default value that Integration Server must return in the absence of a global variable.

output_parameters.name: isSecure
description: Indicates whether the global variable is a password or not.
